$description: DHCW Single Record Design System — Responsive breakpoints. Used to select between mobile and desktop semantic token variants. Not part of the W3C DTCG composite type system — breakpoints are expressed as dimension tokens and consumed by platform-specific implementations.

mobile.$description: Mobile viewport — applies up to and including this width

max.$description: Maximum width for mobile styles. Use: @media (max-width: 767px)

tablet.$description: Tablet viewport — between mobile.max and desktop.min

min.$description: Minimum width for tablet styles. Use: @media (min-width: 768px)

desktop.$description: Desktop viewport — full experience with desktop semantic token variants

min.$description: Minimum width for desktop styles and desktop typography tokens. Use: @media (min-width: 1024px)
